Let's make a game!
name:nothing
author:I
by:Me
desc:have fun?
created:04/21/2026
updated:04/21/2026
version:0.0.1

Settings
	background:https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Gloplewashere/IGM-game/refs/heads/main/images/background.png
  no bulk particles
  stylesheet:https://github.com/Gloplewashere/IGM-game/raw/refs/heads/main/game.css

Layout
*main
  contains:res, buttons, ach
  *ach
	 contains:Achievements
  *res
    contains:Resources
    class:fullWidth
  *buttons
    contains:Buttons
*store
  contains:buildings, upgrades
  *buildings
    contains:BulkDisplay, Buildings
    header:Buildings
    tooltip origin:left
  *upgrades
    contains:Upgrades
    header:Upgrades
    costs:hide
    names:hide
Buttons
 	*bunnyButton
		name:Mine a tree
		desc:Click to find a tree to mine
		on click:anim icon wobble
		on click:yield 1 oakLog
		icon:data:image/png;base64,
		no text
		class:hasFlares
		tooltip origin:bottom
		tooltip class:red
Buildings
	*TEMPLATE
		on click:anim glow
Resources
	*oakLog|oakLogs
		name:oak log|oak logs
		desc:These are your bunnies. You can use them to purchase things. Your goal is to have as many bunnies as possible!
		icon:data:image/png;base64,
		class:noBackground
		show earned
   *oakPlank|oakPlanks
		name:oak plank|oak planks
		desc:These are your bunnies. You can use them to purchase things. Your goal is to have as many bunnies as possible!
		icon:data:image/png;base64,
		class:noBackground
		show earned
Upgrades
	*TEMPLATE
		on click:anim glow
Achievements
  *Minecraft
    name:Wowie! Ten whole clicks!
    desc:You've clicked the big red button 10 times. Well done. Well done indeed.
    req:4 oakPlanks
